hard_policies.title: Business justification required
hard_policies.description: All reimbursements must include a business justification of at least 10 characters.

hard_policies.title: Approved category list
hard_policies.description: Subscriptions must fall into one of: productivity, design, engineering, ai_tools, communication, analytics, security.

hard_policies.title: No duplicate active subscription
hard_policies.description: Employees may not claim for a SaaS product the organisation already licenses and can extend a seat on.

hard_policies.title: Receipt required above MYR 100
hard_policies.description: Any claim over MYR 100 requires a receipt or invoice.

soft_policies.title: Auto-approval threshold
soft_policies.description: Claims at or below MYR 500 with complete documentation may be auto-approved.

soft_policies.title: Manager escalation
soft_policies.description: Claims above MYR 500 and at or below MYR 5000 require manager approval.

soft_policies.title: Finance escalation
soft_policies.description: Claims above MYR 5000 require finance controller approval.

soft_policies.title: Annual plan preference
soft_policies.description: For recurring SaaS over MYR 200/month, annual billing should be preferred when discount is meaningful.
